solution.p: To use the quadratic formula, we identify a=-1.8\text{,} b=-9.8\text{,} and c=2.8\text{.}

The solution set is approximately {\left\{0.272114,-5.71656\right\}}\text{.} Note that since we started with decimal coefficients, we felt it was acceptible to round the solutions to decimal approximations rather than keep to the exact solutions.
